title: Mahindra Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mahindra Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahindra Logistics:
Mahindra Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
